stemHtml: What is the fundamental difference between a trim tab and a servo tab?

options.a: A servo tab affects the stick force stability, whereas a trim tab does not.
options.b: The functioning of a trim tab is based on aerodynamic balancing, whereas a servo tab is usually adjusted via a screwjack.
options.c: A trim tab is automatically adjusted when its particular control surface moves, whereas a servo tab is moved independently of its particular control surface.
options.d: The main purpose of a trim tab is to reduce stick force to zero in steady flight, a servo tab only reduces stick force.
